author: Chairman71
title: Needs improvements in software….
content: Application does not transfer all songs as we transfer data from one iPhone to another iPhone keeping them side by side following camera scan procedure by apple…Always misses lots of songs as we transfer… Otherwise it’s overall good application but needs serious software improvement especially for complete transfer of songs … Best wishes
